title: Null user list crashes dashboard
description: Dashboard crashes on first load when API returns null instead of an empty array.

error_signature.message: TypeError: Cannot read property 'map' of undefined

root_cause.description: API returned null for users field; component assumed an array.

fix_pattern.description: Guard with optional chaining and default to empty array

pr.title: fix: null-safe user list in Dashboard

title: CORS blocked on login API
description: Frontend login fails in staging because the API does not allow the staging origin.

error_signature.message: Access to fetch at 'https://api.staging.example.com/login' from origin 'https://app.staging.example.com' has been blocked by CORS policy

root_cause.description: Staging frontend origin was missing from API CORS allowlist.

fix_pattern.description: Add staging origin to CORS middleware allow_origins

pr.title: fix: add staging origin to CORS

title: Unhandled promise rejection in profile fetch
description: Profile page shows blank state when fetch rejects; error swallowed by missing await.

error_signature.message: Unhandled promise rejection: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'avatar')

root_cause.description: Missing try/catch around async fetch; component rendered before data arrived.

fix_pattern.description: Await fetch inside try/catch and guard render until profile loads
fix_pattern.code_snippet: try { const profile = await fetchProfile(id); setProfile(profile); } catch (e) { setError(e); }

title: Missing env var breaks database connection
description: Local dev fails silently when NEO4J_URI is unset; connection returns None.

error_signature.message: neo4j.exceptions.ServiceUnavailable: Could not connect to neo4j://localhost:7687

root_cause.description: Developer copied repo without .env; default URI pointed to localhost.

fix_pattern.description: Copy .env.example to .env and set AuraDB credentials

pr.title: docs: clarify .env setup for Neo4j Aura

title: JWT expired mid-session redirects loop
description: Users stuck refreshing login when access token expires during a long session.

error_signature.message: AxiosError: Request failed with status code 401 — TokenExpiredError: jwt expired

root_cause.description: Refresh token flow called itself when refresh also returned 401.

fix_pattern.description: Force logout and clear tokens when refresh fails; avoid recursive interceptors

title: Race condition double-submits payment
description: Fast double-click on Pay charged the card twice before the button disabled.

error_signature.message: IntegrityError: duplicate key value violates unique constraint "payments_idempotency_key_key"

root_cause.description: No client debounce and missing server-side idempotency on first deploy.

fix_pattern.description: Disable button on click and require Idempotency-Key header on payment create
fix_pattern.code_snippet: setSubmitting(true); await api.post('/payments', body, { headers: { 'Idempotency-Key': key } });

title: Memory leak from unclosed Neo4j sessions
description: API worker OOMs after heavy query traffic; sessions never closed in finally blocks.

error_signature.message: MemoryError: Unable to allocate array — neo4j.exceptions.ClientError: session leaked

root_cause.description: Driver sessions created per request without context managers.

fix_pattern.description: Always open sessions with `with driver.session() as session:` and close driver on shutdown
fix_pattern.code_snippet:
with get_driver().session() as session:
    return session.run(cypher, **params).data()

title: Timezone off-by-one on deadline badges
description: Deadlines show as overdue one day early for IST users because UTC dates were compared as local dates.

error_signature.message: AssertionError: expected badge 'due tomorrow' but got 'overdue' for 2026-04-09T00:00:00Z in Asia/Kolkata

root_cause.description: Used toDateString() which converts to local midnight incorrectly for UTC midnights.

fix_pattern.description: Compare calendar dates in a fixed timezone with date-fns-tz

title: Redis URL typo crashes Celery worker
description: Background jobs never start in staging because REDIS_URL had a missing slash.

error_signature.message: kombu.exceptions.OperationalError: Error 111 connecting to redis://localhost:6379/0 — Connection refused

root_cause.description: Staging secret pointed at localhost instead of managed Redis.

fix_pattern.description: Point REDIS_URL at the managed instance and fail fast if host is localhost in staging

pr.title: fix: staging Redis URL for Celery

title: Infinite re-render from unstable useEffect deps
description: Settings page freezes browser tab after opening because effect depends on a new object each render.

error_signature.message: Warning: Maximum update depth exceeded. This can happen when a component calls setState inside useEffect.

root_cause.description: useEffect dependency included inline object `{ theme }` recreated every render.

fix_pattern.description: Depend on primitive fields or memoize the options object

title: SQL injection in search filter
description: Security review found string-interpolated WHERE clause in incident search.

error_signature.message: SecurityAlert: Possible SQL injection via query param 'q' — psycopg2.ProgrammingError near "OR 1=1"

root_cause.description: User input concatenated into raw SQL instead of parameterized query.

fix_pattern.description: Use parameterized queries / ORM filters for all user-supplied values
fix_pattern.code_snippet: session.execute(text("SELECT * FROM incidents WHERE title ILIKE :q"), {"q": f"%{q}%"})

title: Cannot read length of undefined on empty cart
description: Checkout summary crashes when cart is undefined after logout.

error_signature.message: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'length')

root_cause.description: Cart store cleared to undefined instead of empty array on logout.

fix_pattern.description: Default cart to [] and guard length access

title: WebSocket reconnect storm after deploy
description: All clients hammered the socket server when reconnect backoff was zero.

error_signature.message: Error: WebSocket is closed before the connection is established

root_cause.description: Reconnect fired immediately with no exponential backoff or jitter.

fix_pattern.description: Add exponential backoff with jitter and max attempts

title: CSRF token mismatch on form POST
description: Settings save fails after cookie domain change; CSRF cookie not sent cross-subdomain.

error_signature.message: Forbidden: CSRF token missing or incorrect — HTTP 403

root_cause.description: CSRF cookie SameSite/domain not updated after moving app to app.example.com.

fix_pattern.description: Set CSRF cookie Domain=.example.com and include credentials on fetch

pr.title: fix: CSRF cookie domain for subdomains

title: Preflight OPTIONS fails for custom header
description: Uploads fail because X-Request-Id is not allowed in Access-Control-Allow-Headers.

error_signature.message: Access to XMLHttpRequest at 'https://api.example.com/upload' has been blocked by CORS policy: Request header field x-request-id is not allowed

root_cause.description: Custom tracing header added on FE without updating CORS allow_headers.

fix_pattern.description: Allow X-Request-Id in CORS middleware headers list

title: Stale closure loses latest search query
description: Debounced search always fires with the first typed character because handler closed over old state.

error_signature.message: AssertionError: expected search call with 'neo4j' but received 'n'

root_cause.description: setTimeout callback captured initial query; missing ref or functional update.

fix_pattern.description: Keep latest query in a ref updated every render before scheduling debounce

title: Pydantic v2 Field default breaks OpenAPI
description: /docs crashes after upgrade because mutable default list used incorrectly on response model.

error_signature.message: pydantic.errors.PydanticUserError: `Field` default cannot be used with `default_factory` — TypeError on QueryResponse

pr.title: fix: pydantic v2 list Field defaults

title: N+1 queries make incidents list slow
description: Incidents index API times out above ~200 rows because each row triggers separate person/PR lookups.

error_signature.message: TimeoutError: Query exceeded 30s — sqlalchemy.exc.TimeoutError on SELECT from persons

root_cause.description: ORM lazy-loaded relationships inside a loop without joinedload.

fix_pattern.description: Eager-load related Person and PR with joinedload / selectinload
